docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK FSB
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK FSB AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, CRISTINA AKA CRISTINA F SALAZAR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-10-2010
